basic_details.job_title: IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Library Trainee Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 25 years as on closing date of application.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 25 years as on the closing date of application.

qualification.education_qualification: MLISc passed out after 2024, 2025 with first class.
qualification.details: Library Trainee: MLISc passed out after 2024, 2025 with first class.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application.
